summary: Iteration 142: Tested 3 bug fixes - Daily Summary→Expenses redirect, Supplier name column in expenses, Export with dates. All fixes verified. Fixed 1 minor backend bug in exports.py (customer without id).

fixed.issue: KeyError: 'id' when customer record missing id field
fixed.fix: Added .get('id') guard in exports.py line 50: cust_map = {c['id']: c['name'] for c in customers if c.get('id')}

critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix 1: DailySummaryPage.jsx line 194 - Total Expenses card onClick navigates to /expenses?date={selectedDate}. VERIFIED working.
Bug Fix 2: ExpensesPage.jsx line 692 - Supplier name column shows supplier.name when expense has supplier_id, else shows '-'. Column positioned between Description and Branch. VERIFIED working.

Bug Fix 3: ExportButtons.jsx lines 6,29-31 accepts startDate/endDate props and passes as start_date/end_date to POST /api/export/data. Backend exports.py lines 29-34 filters by date range. VERIFIED working.
updated_files: /app/backend/routers/exports.py (line 50 - added guard for customer without id)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 142: 3 user-reported bug fixes tested and verified. Bug 1: Daily Summary expenses card redirect to /expenses?date=YYYY-MM-DD working. Bug 2: Expenses page supplier name column visible (shows '-' when no supplier, shows name when supplier_id present). Bug 3: Export buttons on Sales/Expenses pages pass startDate/endDate to backend, which filters data accordingly. Minor fix applied: exports.py line 50 guard for customers without id field.

bug_1_daily_summary_expenses_redirect.test_method: Playwright - clicked Total Expenses card on /daily-summary

bug_2_supplier_name_in_expenses.test_method: Playwright - expanded expense day row to see detail rows
bug_2_supplier_name_in_expenses.result: Third column shows supplier name (or '-' if no supplier)

bug_3_export_with_dates.test_method: Backend pytest - POST /api/export/data with start_date and end_date
bug_3_export_with_dates.result: Both PDF and Excel exports work with date filtering for sales and expenses

frontend_playwright: Expenses page loads with day grouping - PASS
Expense detail rows show supplier column - PASS
Export PDF/Excel buttons visible on Sales page - PASS
Export PDF/Excel buttons visible on Expenses page - PASS
Date quick filters (Today, This Week, etc.) working - PASS
